Here’s the Python implementation for your problem:  

```python
def solve():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.readline
    
    N, M = map(int, input().split())
    S = list(input().strip())
    C = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    # Group indices by color
    color_indices = [[] for _ in range(M + 1)]
    for i, c in enumerate(C):
        color_indices[c].append(i)
    
    # Apply right circular shift for each color
    for indices in color_indices[1:]:
        if len(indices) > 1:
            # Save the last character
            last_char = S[indices[-1]]
            # Shift right by moving each character to the next index in the group
            for j in range(len(indices) - 1, 0, -1):
                S[indices[j]] = S[indices[j - 1]]
